steps.name: Skip a staple without removing from library
steps.criteria: Skipped staple has needed=false; stays in staple library; area neededCount decreases
steps.scenario_name: skips a staple without removing from the library

steps.name: Skipped staple reappears on next trip
steps.criteria: After trip completion, starting a new trip pre-loads the skipped staple with needed=true
steps.scenario_name: skipped staple reappears on next trip

steps.name: Re-add a skipped staple within same trip
steps.criteria: Unskipping a staple sets needed=true; item is back on the trip
steps.scenario_name: re-adds a skipped staple within the same trip

steps.name: Skip multiple staples across areas
steps.criteria: Skipping items in different areas correctly decreases each area's neededCount
steps.scenario_name: skip multiple staples across different areas

steps.name: Complete area and show sweep progress
steps.criteria: completeArea marks area done; getSweepProgress returns completedAreas, completedCount, totalAreas
steps.scenario_name: marks an area as complete and shows sweep progress

steps.name: Navigate areas out of order
steps.criteria: Completing areas in non-sequential order preserves all progress
steps.scenario_name: allows navigating areas out of order

steps.name: All areas complete triggers whiteboard
steps.criteria: When all 5 areas complete, allAreasComplete is true
steps.scenario_name: all areas complete triggers whiteboard consolidation

steps.name: Area count updates on additions
steps.criteria: Adding items during sweep updates area totalCount via groupByArea
steps.scenario_name: area item count updates when items are added during sweep

steps.name: Search staples by prefix
steps.criteria: library.search('gre') returns matching staples with metadata
steps.scenario_name: suggests known staples by name prefix

steps.name: No suggestions for unknown item
steps.criteria: Searching for non-existent item returns empty array
steps.scenario_name: returns no suggestions for unknown item

steps.name: Case-insensitive search
steps.criteria: Searching 'GREEK' finds 'Greek yogurt'
steps.scenario_name: search is case-insensitive

steps.name: Multiple suggestions for partial match
steps.criteria: Searching 'ch' returns all items starting with 'ch'
steps.scenario_name: multiple suggestions for partial match

steps.name: Empty input returns no suggestions
steps.criteria: Searching '' returns empty array
steps.scenario_name: empty input returns no suggestions

steps.name: Determine next section in store order
steps.criteria: Completed section (all checked) followed by next section with unchecked items
steps.scenario_name: determines next section in store order

steps.name: Section progress with partial completion
steps.criteria: groupByAisle returns correct checkedCount/totalCount for partially complete section
steps.scenario_name: section progress reflects partial completion

steps.name: Section completion badges
steps.criteria: Can filter groups by complete vs incomplete status
steps.scenario_name: section list shows completion badges

steps.name: All sections complete enables trip completion
steps.criteria: When every group has checkedCount === totalCount, all sections are complete
steps.scenario_name: all sections complete enables trip completion

steps.name: Trip summary with item breakdown
steps.criteria: getSummary returns totalItems, stapleCount, oneOffCount, sweepCount, whiteboardCount
steps.scenario_name: shows trip summary with item breakdown

steps.name: Prep time display
steps.criteria: getSummary returns prepTimeMinutes based on elapsed time since trip start
steps.scenario_name: displays prep time

steps.name: Summary reflects skipped staples
steps.criteria: Skipped items excluded from totalItems count (only needed items counted)
steps.scenario_name: summary reflects skipped staples

steps.name: Store view transition from summary
steps.criteria: UI-level test — domain layer has no action needed
steps.scenario_name: summary offers store view transition
